purpose: Block story implement runs unless the generated tests have failed before generated implementation materialization for the expected reason.
passConditions: red test receipt references the generated test artifact hash
red test status is failed or blocked for expected missing implementation behavior
red test occurred before implementation materialization
blockConditions: red test failure reason is unrelated to accepted criteria
red test artifact hash does not match generated test receipt
completionPosture: Story implement may not materialize implementation projection until red evidence exists for the same generated test artifact.
